history.content: Hey! 👋 What do you want to tackle right now?
nothing, just curious can you do some research on the web for me about the latest news on oil

Yep—I can absolutely do that.  
I just need a source that’s reachable in this environment (the built-in web search failed just now). If you want, I can still proceed by checking a few major outlets directly (Reuters, Bloomberg, FT, CNBC) and give you a quick oil news brief.
